gist.headline: Painting with LND Ai
gist.blurb: Another beautiful app just sprouted in the community greenhouse. LND Ai is now live, turning text into pixels using our infrastructure.
gist.summary: Added LND Ai, a new text-to-image generation tool, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: The community showcase continues to grow, highlighting another creative way developers are using the Pollinations API.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee in a cozy greenhouse, watering a new glowing flower that has a tiny canvas or picture frame growing from it, representing the new text-to-image app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering a glowing flower that sprouts a tiny framed painting. A retro computer monitor in the background glows with soft lime green (#ecf874) light. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
